title: crataegus monogyna var. nordica
intro: Crataegus monogyna var. nordica, also known as the northern hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn tree, which is a deciduous shrub or small tree with thorny branches and white flowers that produce red fruits. The medicinal properties of Crataegus monogyna var. nordica lie in its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include lowering blood pressure, improving lipid profiles, and reducing the risk of heart disease. Crataegus monogyna var. nordica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or extract, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
